title: Manage API Tokens for CI/CD Integration
description: Developer wants to create an API token for their CI/CD pipeline to automate deployments. They need to list existing tokens, create a new one with appropriate permissions, and verify it works.
prompt: I need to set up automated deployments from our GitLab CI pipeline. Can you help me create an API token that I can use for this? First, show me what tokens I already have, then create a new one called 'gitlab-deploy' that I can use for deployments.
